openalex_id: # OpenAlex topic / concept → cod-kmap research_areas crosswalk.
# Used by scripts/compute_person_areas.py to derive person_areas from
# the per-publication topics stored in publication_topics.
# One OpenAlex id may map to multiple area_ids — emit one row per pair.
# `confidence` is one of high|medium|low and is used as a multiplier
# (1.0 / 0.7 / 0.4) when summing weights across a person's publications.
# IMPORTANT: only marine / coastal / oceanographic topics are mapped
# microbiology…) are intentionally absent so the aggregator skips them
# and we don't dilute a person's research-area scores with co-author
# ============ Long Tail topics — broad LTER / freshwater / disturbance / etc ============

openalex_label: Plant Water Relations and Carbon Dynamics

openalex_id: # Only a handful are useful; the canonical OpenAlex topics above are

openalex_label: but concepts give us an additional fallback

openalex_id: # when topics are missing for older publications.
